lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਏ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਦਇਆਲ ਦੁਖ ਭੰਜਨ ਮੇਰਾ ਸਗਲ ਅੰਦੇਸਰਾ ਗਇਆ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhe kripaal deaal dukh bhanjan meraa sagal andesaraa geaa | rahaau |
lines.english: The Destroyer of distress has become kind and merciful, and all my anxiety is over. ||Pause||
Dayv-Gandhaaree, Fifth Mehl:
I offer my prayer to my True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰੁ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਧਾਰਿ ਸਾਜਿ ਨਿਵਾਜੇ ਮੁਏ ਦੁਸਟ ਜੋ ਖਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kar masatak dhaar saaj nivaaje mue dusatt jo kheaa |1|
lines.english: Placing His hand on my forehead, He has exalted me. The wicked ones who wanted to destroy me have been killed. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਪਾਪੀ ਪਾਖੰਡੀ ਲੋਭੀ ਹਮਰਾ ਗੁਨੁ ਅਵਗੁਨੁ ਸਭੁ ਸਹਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: ham paapee paakhanddee lobhee hamaraa gun avagun sabh sahiaa |
lines.english: I am a sinner, hypocritical and greedy, but still, He puts up with all of my merits and demerits.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਉਪਕਾਰੀ ਸਰਬ ਸਧਾਰੀ ਸਫਲ ਦਰਸਨ ਸਹਜਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: praupakaaree sarab sadhaaree safal darasan sahajeaa |
lines.english: He is generous and benevolent, the beautifier of all, the embodiment of peace; the Blessed Vision of His Darshan is so fruitful!
Dayv-Gandhaaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਿਰਗੁਣ ਕਉ ਦਾਤਾ ਚਰਣ ਕਮਲ ਉਰ ਧਰਿਆ ॥੨॥੨੪॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak niragun kau daataa charan kamal ur dhariaa |2|24|
lines.english: Says Nanak, He is the Giver to the unworthy; I enshrine His Lotus Feet within my heart. ||2||24||
My God is the Master of the masterless.
Protect me on all sides, O Lord;
protect me in the future, in the past, and at the very last moment. ||1||
I have come to the Sanctuary of the Savior Lord. ||Pause||
Contemplating Your virtues, my mind is sanctified. ||2||
Whenever something comes to mind, it is You.
I hear and sing the Hymns of the Guru's Word.
I am a sacrifice, a sacrifice to the Blessed Vision of the Darshan of the Holy. ||3||
O Nanak, my God is the Creator of all. ||4||25||
Within my mind, I have the Support of the One Lord alone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਦਇਆਲ ਮੋਹਿ ਦੀਜੈ ਕਰਿ ਸੰਤਨ ਕਾ ਚੇਰਾ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kripaa nidhaan deaal mohi deejai kar santan kaa cheraa | rahaau |
lines.english: O treasure of kindness, O Merciful Lord, please make me the slave of your Saints. ||Pause||
God, this is my heart's desire:
Dayv-Gandhaaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਅਰਪਿ ਕਰਉ ਜਨ ਸੇਵਾ ਰਸਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਵਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tan man arap krau jan sevaa rasanaa har gun gaavau |1|
lines.english: Dedicating my body and mind, I serve the humble servant of the Lord; with my tongue, I sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਾਤਹਕਾਲ ਲਾਗਉ ਜਨ ਚਰਨੀ ਨਿਸ ਬਾਸੁਰ ਦਰਸੁ ਪਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: praatahakaal laagau jan charanee nis baasur daras paavau |
lines.english: In the early hours of the morning, I fall at the feet of Your humble servants; night and day, I obtain the Blessed Vision of their Darshan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਿਮਰਉ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਅਪੁਨਾ ਸੰਤਸੰਗਿ ਨਿਤ ਰਹੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: saas saas simrau prabh apunaa santasang nit raheeai |
lines.english: With each and every breath, I meditate in remembrance on my God; I live continually in the Society of the Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੁ ਅਧਾਰੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਨੁ ਮੋਰਾ ਅਨਦੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਇਹੁ ਲਹੀਐ ॥੨॥੨੬॥
lines.translit: ek adhaar naam dhan moraa anad naanak ihu laheeai |2|26|
lines.english: The Naam, the Name of the Lord, is my only support and wealth; O Nanak, from this, I obtain bliss. ||2||26||
Raag Dayv-Gandhaaree, Fifth Mehl, Third House:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੋਡਿ ਨ ਜਾਈ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਸੰਗੇ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿ ਗਾਏ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: chhodd na jaaee sad hee sange anadin gur mil gaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He does not leave me, and He always keeps me company. Meeting the Guru, night and day, I sing His Praises. ||1||Pause||
O friend, such is the Dear Lord whom I have obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿਓ ਮਨੋਹਰੁ ਸਰਬ ਸੁਖੈਨਾ ਤਿਆਗਿ ਨ ਕਤਹੂ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: milio manohar sarab sukhainaa tiaag na katahoo jaae |
lines.english: I met the Fascinating Lord, who has blessed me with all comforts; He does not leave me to go anywhere else.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਅਨਿਕ ਭਾਤਿ ਬਹੁ ਪੇਖੇ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਰੋਮ ਨ ਸਮਸਰਿ ਲਾਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: anik anik bhaat bahu pekhe pria rom na samasar laae |1|
lines.english: I have seen the mortals of many and various types, but they are not equal to even a hair of my Beloved. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੰਦਰਿ ਭਾਗੁ ਸੋਭ ਦੁਆਰੈ ਅਨਹਤ ਰੁਣੁ ਝੁਣੁ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: mandar bhaag sobh duaarai anahat run jhun laae |
lines.english: His palace is so beautiful! His gate is so wonderful! The celestial melody of the sound current resounds there.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਦਾ ਰੰਗੁ ਮਾਣੇ ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਥੀਤੇ ਸਦ ਥਾਏ ॥੨॥੧॥੨੭॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak sadaa rang maane grih pria theete sad thaae |2|1|27|
lines.english: Says Nanak, I enjoy eternal bliss; I have obtained a permanent place in the home of my Beloved. ||2||1||27||
Dayv-Gandhaaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਆਇਓ ਹੈ ਸਗਲ ਥਾਨ ਰੇ ਆਹਿ ਪਰਿਓ ਸੰਤ ਪਾਛੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhram aaeo hai sagal thaan re aaeh pario sant paachhai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I have wandered everywhere, and now I have come to follow the Saint. ||1||Pause||
My mind longs for the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan, and His Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਸੁ ਹਉ ਸੇਵੀ ਕਿਸੁ ਆਰਾਧੀ ਜੋ ਦਿਸਟੈ ਸੋ ਗਾਛੈ ॥
lines.translit: kis hau sevee kis aaraadhee jo disattai so gaachhai |
lines.english: Whom should I serve? Whom should I worship in adoration? Whoever I see shall pass away.
